formula: rank(ts_std(amount / circ_market_cap, 60) / ts_std(amount / circ_market_cap, 20)) * rank(-ts_max(turnover_rate,20) / ts_sum(turnover_rate,20))
name: float_compress_even_turnover_20_60

formula: rank(-ts_corr(ret_1d, shift(ret_1d, 1), 20)) * rank(ts_mean(amount / circ_market_cap, 20) / ts_max(amount / circ_market_cap, 20))
name: anti_autocorr_floatflow_evenness_20
